title: Raccoon Removal in SoHo, Manhattan | $900 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in SoHo, Manhattan. Expert wildlife control for lofts, cast-iron buildings & commercial spaces. Licensed & insured. Call now for fast service!
intro: SoHo's historic cast-iron buildings and trendy lofts provide numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, rooftops, and fire escapes. Our professional raccoon removal services protect SoHo homes and businesses from property damage, noise disturbances, and health hazards caused by these intelligent urban wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC delivers humane, effective raccoon exclusion tailored to SoHo's unique architectural landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in wildlife removal for SoHo's distinct building types, from converted industrial lofts to multi-story commercial properties. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and provide comprehensive exclusion services to prevent re-entry, with same-day emergency response available throughout the SoHo area.
localContext: SoHo's cobblestone streets and historic cast-iron architecture, stretching from Houston Street to Canal Street, feature older buildings with vulnerable rooflines and access points that attract raccoons. The neighborhood's mix of high-end retail spaces, art galleries, and residential lofts near Washington Square Park requires discreet, professional wildlife management to maintain property values and safety.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in SoHo?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in SoHo typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and the building's height and accessibility. Multi-story loft buildings may require additional equipment and labor, affecting the final price.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in SoHo buildings?
faqs.answer: SoHo's older cast-iron buildings and converted lofts often have deteriorated rooflines, unsealed vents, and fire escape access that raccoons exploit for den sites. The neighborhood's abundance of restaurant waste and proximity to the Hudson River provides ample food sources that attract raccoons to the area year-round.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in SoHo safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses humane live-trapping methods that comply with NYC wildlife regulations. We safely remove raccoons and their young without harm, then relocate them according to state guidelines. Our exclusion work ensures raccoons cannot re-enter while keeping your SoHo property structurally sound.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in SoHo?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout SoHo and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call. Raccoons can cause significant damage quickly, especially during breeding season (spring), so prompt response is essential to protect your property and prevent health risks from droppings and parasites.
